description: Expand domain blocking to cover ALL addiction and harmful content categories: drugs, alcohol, self-harm, dark web, piracy, and dating/hookup sites. Create new categorized domain list files for each category with comprehensive coverage.
steps: Create pc-blocker/dominios-drogas.txt with 50+ drug marketplace and drug information domains (silk road mirrors, drug forums, cannabis shops, etc.)
Create pc-blocker/dominios-alcohol.txt with 30+ alcohol delivery, promotion, and e-commerce domains (drizly, minibar, totalwine, bodeboca, uvinum, etc.)
Create pc-blocker/dominios-autolesion.txt with 40+ self-harm, pro-anorexia, and suicide-related domains and forums
Create pc-blocker/dominios-darkweb.txt with 30+ dark web access tools, Tor browser download pages, VPN bypass sites, and anonymizer domains
Create pc-blocker/dominios-pirateria.txt with 40+ torrent sites, piracy streaming, and illegal download domains (thepiratebay, 1337x, rarbg, etc.)
Create pc-blocker/dominios-dating.txt with 30+ hookup/dating apps web versions (tinder, grindr, ashley madison, seeking, etc.)
Create pc-blocker/dominios-violencia.txt with 30+ gore, extreme violence, and harmful content domains
Expand the existing dominios-apuestas-prestamos.txt to include 30+ more international gambling sites (stake.com, casumo, leovegas, etc.)
Expand the existing dominios-bloqueados.txt to include 30+ more pornography sites that were missing
All domain files must include both bare domain and www. prefix variants
acceptance_criteria: At least 7 new domain list files exist covering drugs, alcohol, self-harm, dark web, piracy, dating, and violence
Each domain list has at least 30 entries minimum
All domains are formatted as one per line with www. variant included
Existing domain lists are expanded with additional entries
Total combined domain count across all files exceeds 600
verification: Run: cat pc-blocker/dominios-*.txt | grep -v '^$' | grep -v '^#' | wc -l (should be > 600)
Run: cat pc-blocker/dominios-*.txt | grep -c 'www\.' (verify www variants exist)
